summary: Backend regression suite for Valida BACEN executed against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. 25/25 tests passed covering public validate flow, JWT auth, dashboard scoping, proposals listing/CRUD with role-based access (admin vs gerente), 1-proposta-por-CNPJ rule, history manual entries (add/delete), companies CRUD with deletion-blocked-when-in-use, and users admin-only CRUD.

minor.issue: total_companies for gerente is computed via an awkward `len(list(set(...)))` around an async-comprehension — works but inefficient. Use distinct() or a $group aggregation.
HistoryEntryCreate.timestamp is a free-form string with no ISO format validation. Could store malformed datetimes.
Uses positional index — racy if multiple admins edit history concurrently. Consider giving each entry a uuid id.
CNPJ uniqueness check uses raw string match without normalization (strip/format), so '12.345.678/0001-90' vs '12345678000190' would be treated as different.
Accessible by both admin and gerente — acceptable per design, but a gerente can enumerate all gerentes including emails. Confirm if intentional.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1020 lines — consider splitting into modules (auth, proposals, companies, users, public) for maintainability (>700-line guideline).
Lifespan creates a unique index on proposals.company_id, which enforces 1-proposal-per-CNPJ at the DB layer — good belt+suspenders with the explicit 409 check.
Update proposal: when admin sets `gerente_id` to None/empty string, the validation block is bypassed silently. Consider explicit handling for unassign vs assign.
verify_password swallows all exceptions returning False — fine for login but masks bcrypt-config errors during seed import.
JWT_SECRET_KEY committed in .env with a clearly-fake value — fine for preview but flag for production.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@validabacen.com / Admin@123 | Gerente: gerente@validabacen.com / Gerente@123
seed_data_creation: Tests create temporary companies + proposals prefixed with PROP-TEST- / TESTE and cleanup in a session-scoped autouse fixture. No leftover seed data observed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. Suite at /app/backend/tests/test_valida_bacen.py covers all role-based flows and edge cases requested. Next phase should focus on frontend (not yet tested) — particularly the 4.5s delay UX on public validate, admin login redirect, dashboard, proposals CRUD UI, history add/delete UI, and dark/light theme on admin panel only.
